meta.siteDescription: Premium installation, cleaning and service for air conditioning, heating, heat pumps and MaR systems.

home.eyebrow: Climate service for homes and business
home.headline: Modern climate service for homes, offices and technical spaces.
home.subheadline: Installation, cleaning and long-term care for air conditioners, heating, heat pumps and MaR control systems — delivered with a calm, precise and professional approach.
home.servicesText: Clear service architecture built for the Slovak market and easy decision-making.
home.whyTitle: Why clients choose Karpan Climate Service
whyItems: Fast digital communication via WhatsApp and email
Service built around comfort, efficiency and reliability

processItems.title: Request
processItems.text: You send a short request with service type, preferred time and basic details.

processItems.title: Confirmation
processItems.text: We review the request and confirm scope, timing and next steps.

processItems.title: On-site work
processItems.text: Installation, cleaning or servicing is delivered with care and technical precision.

processItems.title: Support
processItems.text: After the visit, communication stays clear for maintenance and follow-up needs.

home.bookingText: A clean digital request form designed for practical scheduling, not unnecessary friction.
home.aboutTitle: Professional climate systems with a modern service standard
home.aboutText: Karpan Climate Service is positioned as a careful engineering-led partner for air quality, heating efficiency and stable control systems. The website experience reflects the same standard: clarity, trust and technical confidence.
home.heroDescription: Designed to feel precise, calm and technically dependable without the visual noise of a standard trade website.
home.heroLeadPathText: WhatsApp, email and booking - nothing unnecessary.

servicesPage.headline: Climate, heating and control systems delivered with precision.
servicesPage.text: Each service page is structured for clarity, trust and practical decision-making.

installation.title: Air conditioner installation
installation.excerpt: New split and multi-split installation with clean execution and reliable setup.

cleaning.title: Air conditioner cleaning
cleaning.excerpt: Deep cleaning focused on hygiene, airflow quality and system performance.

service.title: Air conditioner service
service.excerpt: Preventive maintenance, diagnostics and performance-focused servicing.

heating.title: Heating systems
heating.excerpt: Comfort-driven heating support for homes, offices and technical premises.

heatPumps.title: Heat pumps
heatPumps.excerpt: Efficient heat pump solutions with a modern low-noise technical standard.

mar.title: MaR / control systems
mar.excerpt: Measurement, regulation and smart control logic for reliable operation.

installation.title: Air conditioner installation
installation.intro: Installation designed around clean execution, correct sizing and long-term operational confidence.
body: We approach installation as part of the building system, not as a rushed one-day task. Proper placement, efficient routing and careful finishing influence comfort, noise level and long-term reliability.
The page architecture supports residential and small commercial enquiries, with clear digital conversion through WhatsApp, email and booking request.

cleaning.title: Air conditioner cleaning
cleaning.intro: Regular cleaning protects indoor air quality, efficiency and the general condition of the unit.
body: Cleaning is presented as a responsible maintenance action rather than a generic add-on. The messaging is calm, practical and hygiene-focused.
This structure works well for clients who value trust, careful work and easy scheduling.

service.title: Air conditioner service / maintenance
service.intro: Preventive and corrective service to keep systems stable, efficient and dependable.
body: The service page balances technical clarity with conversion-oriented UX. It is designed to reassure both home and small business clients.
Diagnostics, seasonal checks and ongoing maintenance are communicated in a professional, controlled tone.

heating.title: Heating systems
heating.intro: Heating support built around comfort, system stability and practical efficiency.
body: For heating, the content positions the company as a modern service partner able to support both conventional and updated systems.
The visual style stays restrained and premium, matching the trust required for engineering-related decisions.

heatPumps.title: Heat pumps
heatPumps.intro: Efficient heat pump solutions with a clear focus on comfort, performance and modern operation.
body: Heat pumps require a calm, informed explanation. The content avoids overclaiming and focuses on correct planning, serviceability and dependable operation.
This positioning helps attract quality leads who value a premium service impression.

mar.title: MaR / control systems
mar.intro: Measurement and regulation systems that improve visibility, control and operational consistency.
body: The MaR page broadens the site from a standard HVAC service presence into a more technically credible engineering service brand.
The language is structured to stay accessible while still feeling precise and professional.

about.headline: A careful engineering service approach for modern climate systems.
body: Karpan Climate Service is designed as a premium local service business for clients who care about technical correctness, clean work and clear communication.
The company focus spans installation, cleaning, maintenance, heating systems, heat pumps and MaR-related support, with a digital-first contact experience that respects the client’s time.

contact.headline: Send a service request
contact.text: Choose the service type, preferred date and a convenient contact channel. We will return with a clear follow-up.
contact.legal: Detailed company registration data can be updated later in the configuration file and legal pages.

form.name: Name
form.success: Your request has been sent successfully.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.placeholderMessage: Describe the space, system type or what you need help with.

consent.title: Analytics only with consent
consent.text: We use privacy-friendly first-party analytics to understand visits and clicks. Analytics are activated only after you agree.

legal.privacyIntro: This website collects only the data required to respond to service requests and, if consent is given, privacy-friendly analytics data for website improvement.
legal.cookieIntro: This website uses essential cookies for basic functionality and optional analytics storage only after consent.
legal.cookieEssential: Essential storage is used only for language routing and cookie preference state. Optional analytics storage is disabled until the user explicitly opts in.
legal.cookieAnalytics: The analytics implementation in this project is first-party and focused on aggregate usage: visits, views, CTA clicks, languages, sources and device type.
legal.cookieChoice: Users can refuse optional analytics and continue browsing the website without any reduction in core functionality.
legal.privacyBooking: We process booking request data to respond to enquiries and organize requested services. Data is retained only for the period reasonably required for follow-up and legal obligations.
legal.privacyAnalytics: Where consent is granted, we process privacy-friendly analytics data such as page visits, button clicks, languages and device categories. No advertising profiling is enabled by default in this project.
legal.privacyRights: Users may request access, correction or deletion of personal data as permitted by applicable EU and Slovak law.

footer.tagline: Installation, cleaning and service for climate systems with a precise modern standard.
